prompt: Create a high-end photorealistic studio mockup of a dark gray MacBook Pro laptop floating horizontally in front of a seamless light gray background, supported from below by one realistic dark-skinned hand with the palm up and fingers gently curled under the laptop. The laptop is open at a shallow angle, viewed from the front-left in three-quarter perspective, with the thin black bezel, webcam notch, ports on the left edge, and slim base visible. On the screen, show a luxury architecture/stonework portfolio website for MOREAU: a full-bleed aerial photograph of a modern villa garden with a swimming pool, overlaid with a semi-transparent architectural floor plan drawing. Add a minimalist top navigation bar with exactly 5 visible items: “ATELIER”, “PROJERE”, “MÉTHODE”, “À PROPOS”, and an orange button labeled CONTACT. In the upper-left screen corner place a small square monogram icon and the word “MOREAU”. On the left side of the screen add small uppercase text “SÉQUENCE 01 · APPROCHE”. Add a large elegant serif headline in the lower-left reading La pierre comme temps, with the first words in white and the final word in muted teal/terracotta overlay styling. Use warm golden-hour lighting inside the website image, refined editorial typography, premium agency branding, realistic reflections on the glass screen, subtle shadows beneath the laptop and hand, crisp focus, no watermark, no extra devices, no clutter.
